content.en:
A thought in the realm instantly shuttled outside the Terran Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, and now the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm has surpassed the Ancestral Realm and reached the level of the strongest Ancestral Realm, both the cultivation environment and the cultivation environment are far beyond the naturally born Ancestral Realm.

This place has completely developed into the core of the Terrans, and the Terran Ancestral Realm in those dark holy places has become a branch.

And after Ye Tian's creation, even the first ancestor could hardly spy on the slightest situation in the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm.

When a thought came to him, the ancestor of the human race naturally discovered it.

"Realm Ancestor, are you here for something?"

One of the Terran ancestors asked.

"I want to meet the Ten Thousand Law Ancestors!" the Realm Ancestor said.

"Okay, I'll go and ask, as for whether the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws will see you, I can't guarantee it!"

After all, even these human ancestors hadn't seen the Ten Thousand Law Ancestors for a long time.

Soon, the Ancestor of the Human Race went to see the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws.

In fact, Ye Tian naturally knew that the Realm Ancestor was coming, after all, he was not in a state of wholehearted retreat now, so he still knew about the situation in the outside world.

Even he could probably guess the purpose of the Realm Ancestor, so he was hesitating to see the Realm Ancestor.

"Forget it, let's go see it!"

Ye Tian's incarnation appeared outside the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm and met the Realm Ancestor.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Realm Ancestor said respectfully.

This was the first time in a long time that he had seen the Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws.

At this time, he was a little frightened.

Because the aura on the body of the Ten Thousand Law Ancestor was far beyond his imagination, it was not at all the aura that the top Ancestor could have.

The Ancestor of the Strongest!

The Realm Ancestor has come to his senses!

Obviously, Ye Tian really stepped into the realm of the strongest ancestor as rumored.

"Realm Ancestor, what are you looking for me?" Ye Tian asked.

The Realm Ancestor said, "Ten Thousand Law Ancestors, now that the Ancestors of our Dark Forbidden Realm are in a meeting, everyone is discussing how to deal with the Great Tribulation. As a representative, I would like to ask whether the Terrans are capable of coping with the Great Tribulation, and if the Terrans are capable of coping with the Great Tribulation, everyone wants to join the Terrans and become subordinate forces of the Terrans. "

"Realm Ancestor, if you go back and say it, just say that the human race is not capable of dealing with the catastrophe!" Ye Tian said.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, is it true that the human race is incapable of dealing with the Great Tribulation?" asked the Realm Ancestor seriously.

Ye Tiandao: "Once the catastrophe comes, the battle gate can come to the Terran territory for refuge, but other forces cannot. "

"Why?"

Jiezu wanted to know why.

"Because the human race can't protect all the forces!" Ye Tian sighed: "You don't know how powerful those foreign forces are, the Supreme Ancestor is divided into three levels, the first level, the second level, and the third level, and above the Supreme Ancestor there is the Invincible Ancestor. There are six Exotic Forces with Invincible Ancestors, and these six Exotic Forces are the forces behind the six forbidden lands. The Terrans are not their opponents, and once they really want to protect all the forces, they need to face all the opponents. And when the catastrophe comes, those foreign forces must slaughter and empty the entire dark forbidden realm, and with my ability, protecting this area of the human race is the limit. "

"I understand, thank you Wanfa Ancestor!"

Jie Ancestor said gratefully.

Subsequently, this thought of the Realm Ancestor returned to its essence.

......

"Realm Ancestor, what did the Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor say?"

One Ancestor asked, looking extremely urgent.

The Realm Ancestor sighed: "The Terrans said that they could not protect us, and they were not sure that they would survive the catastrophe, once they accepted us, they would need to face the threat of more foreign forces, so they did not agree!"

"Damn the Terrans!"

"I shouldn't have expected the Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor to agree!"

"Forget it, I'd better find a safe place to hide!"

Then, one by one, the ancestors left.

There were also some Ancestors who traveled to forbidden places to try to join the foreign forces.

However, these ancestors never appeared again.

As time passed, the Dark Realm Tribulation grew closer.

this day.

Ye Tian mobilized the Terrans from the dark holy lands one by one, and one by one the ancestors took action, or personally brought back the Terrans from each territory, or opened the gate of time and space, and let the Terran travel through the gate of time and space by themselves and return to the realm of Dao Mountain.

There are too many Terrans in the entire Dark Forbidden Realm, and it will take a long time to mobilize them back.

In order to be able to settle these people, the ancestors of the Terran built a large number of worlds in the area around the Daoshan Realm.

It took several realm years to finally completely relocate the entire Terrans.

At this point, the territory of the Terran with the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm as the core is the only territory of the Terran, and all other territories have been abandoned.

Some small forces who don't know the situation are very excited to see that the human race has given up so much territory and even the ancestral realm, and they have settled in these ancestral realms and many territories, but they don't know that the catastrophe has come, and these territories are useless at all.

The Terrans are preparing, and so are the ancestors of other forces.

They all gave up their forces, because they couldn't keep it at all, and they all went into hiding.

If you're lucky, you'll still be able to survive some of the ancestors.

Calamity Montenegro.

An ancient ancestor who exuded the aura of calamity appeared, the ancient ancestor was equivalent to the ancestor, and the ancient ancestor of Calamity Black Mountain was not only physically powerful, but also good at spells, even if it was a long distance, through a hair, he could curse the other party.

Even if the opponent has many clones and the main body, as long as you pass through one clone, you can instantly kill all the clones of the opponent.

Therefore, the ancient ancestors of Calamity Black Mountain are very powerful and terrifying.

In a short time, three third-level Supreme Ancient Ancestors came over from the other end of the second-order gate.

Dozens of Supreme Ancient Ancestors, tens of thousands of ordinary Ancient Ancestors, this time the Calamity Black Mountain mobilized a lot of power.

Moreover, they can also send more strong men to arrive at any time.

In addition to Calamity Montenegro, other foreign forces are also ready, just waiting for the Dark Forbidden Tribulation to come.

Bang!!!!

The Dark Forbidden Tribulation has arrived, and the rules of the entire Dark Forbidden Realm have changed slightly, and they no longer exclude the strong of the Outer Realm.

He had already experienced a great tribulation in the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, so he was naturally very familiar with the changes in the great tribulation.

"Open the Great Array!"

Ye Tian ordered.

Suddenly, in the territory of the human race, countless large arrays opened, countless domain ancestors guarded their positions as formations, and many ancestors of the human race were also maintaining the large array.

Ye Tian had already given the order, not allowing any Ancestor to go out and snatch the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

And Ye Tian also copied the replica body, the body sits in the Terran, the replica body goes out to snatch the origin rule robbery crystal, once a foreign powerhouse invades the Terran, his replica body can come to support at any time.
